events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: reversed polarity is a clear NEC 406.4 violation (incorrect hot/neutral orientation) and a shock/fire hazard that GFCI protection under 210.8 doesn't cure — decision is **fail**, risk **high**, with corrective rewiring and retesting required before the rough-in can proceed to trim-out/cover.
